description: Semi-hard platform gate for codex-with-cc subagent routing.

hooks.command: node --input-type=module -e "import path from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT || process.env.CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT; if (!root) { console.error('Missing CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT or CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT'); process.exit(1); } await import(pathToFileURL(path.join(root, 'hooks', 'subagent-gate-hook.mjs')).href);"

node --input-type=module -e "import path from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT || process.env.CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT; if (!root) { console.error('Missing CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT or CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT'); process.exit(1); } await import(pathToFileURL(path.join(root, 'hooks', 'subagent-gate-hook.mjs')).href);"

node --input-type=module -e "import path from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT || process.env.CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT; if (!root) { console.error('Missing CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT or CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT'); process.exit(1); } await import(pathToFileURL(path.join(root, 'hooks', 'subagent-gate-hook.mjs')).href);"
